title: Switzerland - The Alpine Crown Jewel
description: Lucerne at dawn, Jungfraujoch at noon, Zurich at dusk. Switzerland doesn't offer views - it offers vertical poetry. Premium rail passes, lakeside hotels, and chocolate fondue evenings included.

title: Germany - Castles, Christmas & Craft Beer
description: Neuschwanstein Castle rising from the Bavarian mist, the Rhine Valley's half-timbered villages, Berlin's electric energy. Germany covers every mood - history, nature, and unforgettable evenings.

title: Italy - La Dolce Vita in Every Piazza
description: Rome's Colosseum, Venice's canals, Tuscany's cypress-lined roads, and Amalfi's cliffside lemons. Italy is not a country - it's a sensory overload, served with pasta and a Campari sunset.

title: France - Paris, Provence & Beyond
description: The Eiffel Tower at midnight, the lavender fields of Provence, Mont Saint-Michel at high tide. France gives you art, cuisine, and the feeling that you're living inside a painting.

title: Sweden & Finland - Chasing the Northern Lights
description: Aurora borealis over Lapland's frozen lakes, husky sledding at minus 20 C, glass igloos under an electric sky. Sweden and Finland offer the most extraordinary nights on earth - literally.

title: Scotland - Highlands, Whisky & Wild Coasts
description: The Isle of Skye's black Cuillins, Eilean Donan Castle rising from a loch, single malts swirling in ancient distilleries. Scotland is the most dramatic landscape in Europe that most travellers haven't properly seen.

title: Netherlands & Belgium - Masters & Moules
description: Rijksmuseum Rembrandts, Amsterdam's canal ring at golden hour, Bruges' medieval chocolate-box streets, Ghent's alleyways. The Low Countries pack remarkable density of beauty into very few kilometres.

title: Greece - Gods, Islands & Olive Groves
description: Santorini's blue domes at sunset, Mykonos' windmills, the Acropolis at dusk. Greece is the birthplace of beauty - and it shows in every sunset, every feta-crumbled salad, and every whitewashed alleyway.

title: Spain - Flamenco, Gaud & the Sun-Drenched South
description: Barcelona's Sagrada Fam lia, Madrid's Prado, the Alhambra's Moorish grandeur, and Ibiza's legendary sunsets. Spain contains multitudes - and rewards those who stay long enough to feel them.

title: Eastern Europe Highlights - Prague, Budapest & Vienna
description: Three grand imperial capitals in one extraordinary circuit: Prague's Charles Bridge at dawn, Budapest's thermal baths, Vienna's Sachertorte in a fin-de-si cle caf . Elegance without the Western price tag.

title: Russia - Moscow, St. Petersburg & the Trans-Siberian
description: St. Basil's Cathedral in Red Square, the Hermitage's 3 million masterworks, the Catherine Palace's golden halls, and the world's most dramatic train journey threading Siberia's vast silence.

title: Japan - Where Ancient Meets Ultramodern
description: Cherry blossoms along the Philosopher's Path, bullet trains threading rice paddies, ramen at 2am in Tokyo, Kyoto's 10,000 torii gates. Japan operates on another level of excellence - in everything.

title: China - The Dragon Awakened
description: The Great Wall at Mutianyu stretching to the horizon, Shanghai's Pudong skyline reflected in Huangpu River, Xi'an's Terracotta Army standing in silent formation for 2,200 years. China's scale is humbling.

title: South Korea - K-Culture, Palaces & Hiking
description: Seoul's Bukchon Hanok village at golden hour, hiking Seoraksan's granite peaks, K-drama film locations, night markets overflowing with tteokbokki. South Korea is compact, intense, and deeply satisfying.

title: Singapore - The City That Does Everything Right
description: Gardens by the Bay's Supertrees glowing at night, hawker centres where a Michelin-starred meal costs SGD 6, Sentosa's beaches, and the cleanest, safest, most efficient city on earth.

title: Bhutan - The Last Shangri-La
description: A kingdom that measures its wealth in Gross National Happiness. Tiger's Nest monastery clinging to a cliff, prayer flags snapping in thin air, yaks grazing below Himalayan peaks. Bhutan is the most serene place you will ever visit.

title: Thailand - The Land of Smiles (and Temples)
description: Bangkok's golden spires at dawn, Chiang Mai's lantern festival, Krabi's limestone karsts rising from jade water. Thailand delivers the perfect ratio of culture, beach, food, and value that no other destination quite matches.

title: Vietnam - A Country, Not Just a Destination
description: Halong Bay's limestone towers piercing morning fog, Hoi An's lantern-lit ancient town, Hanoi's street food chaos at its finest. Vietnam moves from north to south like a perfectly constructed novel.

title: Sri Lanka - The Teardrop of the Indian Ocean
description: Sigiriya's rock fortress, tea-estate trains threading misty Ella hills, colonial Galle Fort, blue whales off Mirissa, wild leopards in Yala. Sri Lanka is astonishingly varied for an island you can drive across in a day.

title: Bali - The Island of the Gods
description: Ubud's rice terraces cascading to the valley, Tanah Lot at sunset, Seminyak's world-class beach clubs, and spiritual healing energy that permeates every temple and ceremony. Bali is transcendent for couples.

title: India - Kerala, Rajasthan & the Golden Triangle
description: The Taj Mahal at sunrise, Jaipur's Pink City bazaars, Kerala's houseboat sunsets on silent backwaters. India is not one destination - it's thirty. We build the best ones into one seamless journey.

title: Uzbekistan - Samarkand, Bukhara & the Blue Domes
description: Registan Square's three medrasa facades glittering with Timurid tilework, Bukhara's mud-brick labyrinth, Shah-i-Zinda's mosaic canyon. Uzbekistan is the Silk Road's most spectacular surviving act - and MGT's most under-the-radar bestseller.

title: Azerbaijan - Where Europe Meets the Orient
description: Baku's Old City walls rising beside flame-shaped glass towers, Sheki's caravanserai, Gobustan's mud volcanoes, and the Caspian's mercurial light. Azerbaijan is the surprise of the decade.

title: Turkey - Istanbul, Cappadocia & the Turquoise Coast
description: Hot air balloons over Cappadocia's fairy chimneys at sunrise, the Blue Mosque's six minarets at dusk, gulets sailing the Aegean past sunken Lycian ruins. Turkey delivers luxury and antiquity in the same breath.

title: Jordan - Petra, Wadi Rum & the Dead Sea
description: The Siq opening to reveal Petra's Treasury, Wadi Rum's red sand desert glowing at dusk, floating effortlessly in the Dead Sea's mineral-dense silence. Jordan is a short flight and a world apart.

title: Oman - Arabia's Most Beautiful Secret
description: Muscat's white-washed Royal Opera House, the Grand Canyon-like Jebel Akhdar gorge, Nizwa Fort's Friday goat market, and Wahiba Sands' golden dunes at first light. Oman is what you imagined Arabia to be.

title: Maldives - The Overwater Villa Dream
description: A private water villa where the floor is glass and the Indian Ocean is your carpet. Manta ray snorkel at dawn, sunset dolphin cruise, bioluminescent beach walk at midnight. The Maldives is not a holiday - it's a religion.

title: Salalah, Oman - Arabia's Green Season Secret
description: During the Khareef (monsoon) season, arid Dhofar transforms - waterfalls flow, frankincense trees drip with resin, coconut palms bend in misty sea winds. Salalah in summer is unlike anything else in Arabia.

title: Seychelles - The Granite Garden of Eden
description: Anse Source d'Argent's sculpted granite boulders, Vall e de Mai's prehistoric coco de mer palms, and sea turtles nesting on Aldabra. Seychelles was designed by a world that hadn't yet decided to be practical.

title: Mauritius - The Honeymoon Island
description: Champagne-pink sunsets, turquoise lagoons rimmed by coral reef, undersea waterfalls viewed from above, and resorts that understand what luxury actually means. Mauritius is one of the most complete island experiences on earth.

title: Phuket & Thai Islands - The Beach You Dreamed Of
description: Phi Phi Islands' vertical limestone walls, Khao Sok's jungle-lake kayaking, Koh Lanta's long-tail boats at golden hour. Thailand's islands are achingly beautiful - and still genuinely affordable.

title: Bali & Lombok - Island Twins, Different Souls
description: Bali's temples, rice terraces, and world-class spa culture paired with Lombok's raw, unhurried Gili Islands - white sand, no motorbikes, and sunsets that make you stay one more night, then another.

title: USA - East Coast, West Coast & Vegas
description: New York City's skyline at midnight, the Grand Canyon's mile-deep silence, Las Vegas' neon fever dream, and the Pacific Coast Highway unspooling along California's cliffs. America is the world's most cinematic road trip.

title: Canada - Niagara, Rockies & the Great North
description: Niagara Falls' roar, Banff's impossibly turquoise Lake Louise, Vancouver's mountain-sea horizon, and the Northern Lights dancing over Yukon. Canada is the USA's quieter, more polite, and arguably more beautiful cousin.

title: Mexico - Riviera Maya, Mexico City & Cenotes
description: Chichen Itza's pyramid casting its serpent shadow at equinox, Tulum's Mayan cliff temples above turquoise Caribbean, cenote swimming in prehistoric sinkholes. Mexico is deeper and more extraordinary than its resort reputation suggests.

title: Peru - Machu Picchu, the Sacred Valley & the Amazon
description: The Inca citadel emerging from cloud forest at 2,430 metres, the Sacred Valley's terraced ruins, Lake Titicaca's floating islands, and the Amazon's cathedral of green. Peru is the most rewarding country on earth to understand slowly.

title: Brazil & Argentina - Iguazu, Rio & Patagonia
description: Iguazu Falls' 275 cascades straddling two countries, Rio's Christ the Redeemer surveying the Carnival city, and Patagonia's granite Torres del Paine rising above glacial ice. South America's southern cone at its absolute wildest.

title: Kenya & Tanzania Safari - The Great Migration
description: 1.5 million wildebeest crossing the Mara River in a scene unchanged for 10,000 years, lions on acacia silhouettes at dusk, and lodge breakfasts while elephants graze 50 metres away. The African safari is the world's most extraordinary wildlife spectacle.

title: Zanzibar - The Spice Island Dream
description: Stone Town's labyrinthine Arab alleys, clove and cardamom drifting from doorways, dhow sunsets over the Indian Ocean, and Nungwi's white sand reef just steps from your beach bungalow. Zanzibar pairs perfectly with a mainland Tanzania safari.

title: South Africa - Cape Town, Safari & the Garden Route
description: Table Mountain's tablecloth cloud at sunrise, the Garden Route's fynbos-scented coast, a Kruger Park leopard in a tamboti tree, and Franschhoek's Michelin-calibre wine estates. South Africa is the most complete country in the world.

title: Egypt - Pharaohs, Pyramids & the Nile
description: The Great Pyramid at Giza - the only surviving ancient wonder - Luxor's Valley of the Kings, Abu Simbel's colossi carved into Nubian sandstone, and a Nile felucca drifting past temples that predate Rome by 2,000 years.

title: Morocco - Medinas, Mountains & the Sahara
description: Fez's medieval medina unchanged since the 9th century, Marrakech's Djemaa el-Fna at midnight, the Atlas Mountains' Berber villages, and sleeping in a desert camp as the Erg Chebbi dunes turn gold at dawn.
